Metadata.title: Modern Web in 3 Minutes
Metadata.description: Learn the basics of modern web design step by step.

Step0.title: Content is Everything
Step0.p1: Everything starts with content. Whether it's a product or a portfolio; the sole purpose of design is to present the content in the best possible way.
Step0.p2: More than 90% of the web is text. So, to make this raw text beautiful, what is the

Step6.title: Artificial Intelligence
Step6.description: Our coding habits are changing; instead of entering every line manually, we now design living interfaces by giving the right directives to artificial intelligence.
Step6.p2: The interfaces of the future are no longer static, but smart and interactive. Everything looks great!

Step7.title: Congratulations! 🎉
Step7.p1: In a short time, we transitioned from an unstyled HTML page to a modern and accessible web application. Catching up with these standards is now a necessity in the modern web.
Step7.virastack_desc: I developed the ViraStack ecosystem so you can instantly integrate what you've learned into your projects. Instead of starting from scratch, you can use these tested open-source tools.
Step7.virastack_star: You can support the projects by giving them a star (⭐) on GitHub!
Step7.nextjs_desc: Production-ready Next.js 16+ starter template built with Tailwind CSS 4 and TypeScript.
Step7.ai_rules_desc: AI-native architecture kit and high-discipline protocols for modern React applications.
Step7.password_desc: Fully accessible and highly customizable password visibility hook for React.
Step7.input_mask_desc: Lightweight, zero-dependency input masking library optimized for React Hook Form.
